name: Sprinklr, Inc.
description: Sprinklr, Inc. provides an enterprise cloud software platform that enables organizations to manage customer-facing functions across various digital channels. The company's Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified-CXM) platform uses advanced artificial intelligence to help brands listen to, engage, and reach customers across social media, messaging, chat, and review sites. Sprinklr serves global enterprises across diverse industries, helping them collaborate across internal silos to deliver consistent, personalized customer experiences.
